channel.title: Musing
channel.description: Essays, short notes, and everything in between.

item.title: The Ride, the Road, the Chai
item.description: A motorbike, an open highway, and a roadside chai stall — sometimes the best journeys are the ones with no destination.

item.title: He Disappeared. Let Go
item.description: A quiet story about a boy who learned to disappear — not all at once, but slowly, until no one noticed.

item.title: Welcome to Musing
item.description: The very first post — why I built this space, what you can expect, and a little about how it all works under the hood.
